title: The attoclock
text: Developed attosecond angular streaking — the attoclock — opening a route to timing electron-wavepacket motion on its natural scale, and setting the metrological foundation for the group's later attosecond spectroscopies.

title: Mid-IR OPCPA and strong-field scaling
text: Conceived and built the long-wavelength laser technology that made the group independent of external light sources, enabling ponderomotively scaled attoscience, electron diffraction, high-harmonic and soft X-ray generation.

title: Isolated attosecond soft X-rays in the water window
text: Directed development of attosecond continua reaching the carbon, nitrogen and oxygen core edges — element-specific access to the light elements that structure matter and molecules.

title: The first molecular selfie
text: Imaged a molecule with its own electrons — capturing di-ionized acetylene breaking apart in real space and time, at the resolution limit set by physics.

title: Attosecond core-level spectroscopy in materials
text: Pioneered attosecond X-ray absorption spectroscopy in a solid, resolving carrier dephasing and energy flow into specific lattice modes in real time, in graphite.

title: High-harmonic spectroscopy of a high-Tc superconductor
text: Showed that high-harmonic spectroscopy distinguishes the electronic phases of YBCO, extending strong-field spectroscopy to quantum phase transitions in correlated matter.

title: Many-body response in strongly driven graphite
text: Extended attosecond X-ray spectroscopy to strongly driven condensed-phase dynamics, quantifying correlated many-body response beyond a single-particle picture.

title: Controlling valley polarization through topology
text: Valley polarization was thought to need a broken-symmetry crystal. A tailored light field broke that symmetry optically instead — steering valley and topology in bulk, centrosymmetric MoS₂ where it should not have been possible.

title: Watching a molecule open its ring
text: Disentangled electronic and vibrational dynamics across a conical intersection during a molecular ring-opening reaction, using attosecond core-level spectroscopy.

title: The quantum-optical nature of high-harmonic generation
text: Provided experimental evidence that harmonic emission carries photon-statistical information beyond the coherent field — the founding observation behind harmonic photon-statistics spectroscopy.

title: Shortest pulse of light ever generated
text: A brilliant source of 19.2 attosecond soft X-ray pulses — the shortest ever generated, and shorter than the interval that defines an electron's orbit in hydrogen.
